MINI MINUTES FOR APR-11-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF ADMITS THAT THE DEBT WAS THE RESULT OF FRAUD. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT VACATES THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISSES THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

Plaintiff's motion to vacate the default and default judgment is granted and the case is dismissed without prejudice. No opposition filed. Plaintiff admits that the debt was the result of fraud. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court vacates the default and default judgment and dismisses this case without prejudice.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
